testimonials.name: Training graduate
testimonials.text: Full-stack course was practical — projects matched what agencies actually ship.

title: Frequently asked questions
subtitle: Quick answers — use Ask price or contact for a tailored quote.

items.title: How much does a website cost?
items.desc: Depends on pages, design depth, and integrations. Use Request pricing in the menu for a written ballpark.

items.title: How long does delivery take?
items.desc: Starter sites often ship in one to two weeks. Larger builds follow an agreed milestone plan.

items.title: Do you provide maintenance?
items.desc: Yes — security updates, content help, and monitoring on monthly or annual plans.

items.title: Will my site be mobile-friendly?
items.desc: All layouts are responsive and tested on common Android and iOS screen sizes.

items.title: Do you help with SEO?
items.desc: Baseline technical SEO is included; ongoing SEO and ads are available as separate engagements.
